seedanceSegments.title: Crisp mozzarella hook
seedanceSegments.description: Open with the finished arancini: crisp crack, creamy rice, peas, and mozzarella reveal.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @SourceFinalAranciniPhoto only as serving composition reference from the uploaded recipe photo. Use @SourceCutOpenAranciniPhoto only as cut-open interior reference from the uploaded recipe photo. Use @FriedGoldenAranciniFrame only as golden breadcrumb crust color reference. Use @CutOpenAranciniMozzarellaFrame only as interior structure reference: creamy rice, green peas, central mozzarella, realistic short cheese stretch. Use @Spoon only as spoon shape reference. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to keep the cutting hand visible and attached to a small kitchen knife described in the shot. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Only close-up kitchen ASMR synchronized with cuts and food actions. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s visible hand guides a small knife tip, golden crust cracks open; 1.0-2.1s cut widens to creamy rice, peas, and mozzarella; 2.1-2.9s rustic bowl of round golden arancini; 2.9-3.7s spoon nudges one arancino and crumbs fall; 3.7-5.0s extreme macro pea and mozzarella interior. Global negatives: no floating knife, no self-opening food, no raw rice, no tomato sauce, no long elastic pizza-style cheese pull, no extra hands, no text, no captions, no music.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opens on final payoff, then the next segment rewinds into the risotto base.
seedanceSegments.risk: Cheese pull may become too long or pizza-like; constrain to a short mozzarella stretch and state reference.

seedanceSegments.title: Toast the risotto base
seedanceSegments.description: Parmesan prep, shallots, foaming butter, rice toast, and wine hiss.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for overhead prep inserts. Use @InductionCloseup only for stovetop pan actions with no flame. Use @SaucepanLarge only as pan shape reference. Use @Spatula only as stirring tool reference. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible Licorn hands during prep. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro food textures, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s parmesan falls like pale snow; 0.8-1.5s chopped echalotes scatter into pan; 1.5-2.4s butter melts and foams; 2.4-3.2s risotto rice pours in; 3.2-4.2s spatula sweeps glossy rice pearls; 4.2-5.0s white wine hits hot rice and hisses. Global negatives: no appliance controls, no flames, no burning, no text, no captions, no extra utensils.

seedanceSegments.title: Cream, peas, and cooling
seedanceSegments.description: Stock pour, creamy state jump, parmesan melt, peas and parsley fold, cooling spread.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for mixing and cooling shots. Use @InductionCloseup only for stock and simmer shots with no flame. Use @SaucepanLarge only as pan shape. Use @Spatula only as folding and spreading tool. Use @HotCreamyPeaRisottoPanFrame only as the hot cooked risotto target state: thick glossy starchy rice wave, green peas not yet folded. Use @CooledPeaRisottoSheetFrame only as the later cooled state: pale risotto spread thin, green peas visible, matte enough to scoop. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for visible hands. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s stock floods rice; 0.9-2.0s hard cut to thick glossy risotto wave behind spatula using hot risotto state; 2.0-2.9s parmesan snow melts; 2.9-3.7s peas and parsley tumble in; 3.7-4.8s one broad sticky fold; 4.8-6.0s risotto spreads thin to cool, matte target state. Global negatives: no soupy rice after the hard cut, no dry separate rice, no flame, no text, no extra shots.

Use @HotCreamyPeaRisottoPanFrame only as the hot cooked risotto target state: thick glossy starchy rice wave, green peas not yet folded. Use @CooledPeaRisottoSheetFrame only as the later cooled state: pale risotto spread thin, green peas visible, matte enough to scoop. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only for visible hands. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, no text on screen. seedanceSegments.continuity: Ends with risotto in a cooled, shapeable state for segment 04.
seedanceSegments.risk: Long risotto cooking is fragile if shown as continuous morphing; use hard cut and state reference.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: stock pour; thick risotto stir; parmesan sprinkle; peas scatter; sticky spatula spread

seedanceSegments.title: Shape and hide mozzarella
seedanceSegments.description: Cooled risotto is scooped, cupped, filled with mozzarella, sealed, rolled, and staged.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for shaping shots. Use @CooledPeaRisottoSheetFrame only as cooled moldable risotto state. Use @StuffedRiceBallFrame only as filled and sealed ball topology: mozzarella hidden in the center, smooth rice sphere outside, green peas visible in rice. Use @Spoon only as scooping tool shape. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible hands. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s scoop cooled pea risotto; 0.8-1.7s hands press a shallow rice cup; 1.7-2.4s mozzarella cube drops into center; 2.4-3.4s rice closes and seam disappears; 3.4-4.2s sealed ball rolls once into a round sphere; 4.2-5.0s tray of smooth rice balls. Global negatives: no exposed cheese after sealing, no collapsing rice, no extra hands, no text, no captions, no music.

seedanceSegments.continuity: The mozzarella center must stay hidden until the final cut-open payoff.
seedanceSegments.risk: Seedance may leave mozzarella visible on the outside; state reference and negative constraints are required.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: sticky rice scoop; soft hand press; cheese cube drop; palm roll; tray tap

seedanceSegments.title: Double breadcrumb armor
seedanceSegments.description: Flour, egg, crumbs, second egg, second crumbs, then a tray of rough breaded spheres.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for breading station composition. Use @StuffedRiceBallFrame only as the pre-coated rice ball topology. Use @DoubleBreadedAranciniTrayFrame only as target breaded state: rough pale breadcrumb shell, round 6 cm spheres, no exposed rice or cheese. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown only to preserve visible hands moving one ball through stations. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s ball rolls through flour, white dust trail; 0.8-1.6s floured ball dips into beaten egg and turns glossy; 1.6-2.5s breadcrumbs rain and stick; 2.5-3.2s second egg dip darkens crumbs; 3.2-4.1s second breadcrumb coat forms pebbly armor; 4.1-5.0s tray of double-breaded arancini. Global negatives: no loose filling, no raw meat texture, no text, no captions, no music, no extra stations.

seedanceSegments.continuity: One ball travels through coating stations, then a tray implies the full batch.
seedanceSegments.risk: Repeated coating can confuse sequence order; timing explicitly names each station.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: flour drag; wet egg dip; dry breadcrumb rain; crumb press; tray slide

seedanceSegments.title: Fry to gold
seedanceSegments.description: Oil shimmer, sizzle entry, golden color change, lift, and drain.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @InductionCloseup only as induction frying context, no flame. Use @SaucepanLarge only as deep high-sided pan reference. Use @DoubleBreadedAranciniTrayFrame only as pale pre-fry breadcrumb shell state. Use @FriedGoldenAranciniFrame only as target fried state: round golden breadcrumb shell, tiny oil droplets, no burnt patches. Use @Spoon only as draining spoon or skimmer shape reference. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterLeft only for safe visible hand/tool presence when lowering and lifting food. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.7s clear oil shimmers in pan; 0.7-1.7s one breaded ball lowers into oil and bubbles erupt; 1.7-2.7s batch gently bubbles and turns golden by hard cut; 2.7-3.8s golden arancino lifts in a visible draining spoon with oil droplets; 3.8-5.0s arancini drain on absorbent paper. Global negatives: no floating skimmer, no open flame, no oil splash onto hands, no black burnt crust, no text, no captions, no music.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Transforms the double-breaded tray state into fried golden arancini for final serving.

seedanceSegments.title: Serve hot in Licorn kitchen
seedanceSegments.description: Final bowl, cut-open plate, short mozzarella stretch, and satisfied character in kitchen context.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity and final hero context. Use @SourceFinalAranciniPhoto only as serving bowl composition reference. Use @CutOpenAranciniMozzarellaFrame only as creamy rice, green pea, and short mozzarella stretch state. Use @CharacterSheet for the visible cutting hand and final character identity. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, no text on screen. Global negatives: no floating knife, no self-opening food, no dialogue, no captions, no music, no long cheese pull, no tomato sauce, no extra dishes, no extra shots.
